deadlines.title: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS EOS (Intune)
deadlines.action: Identify 22.04 devices in Intune and start upgrade comms. New enrollments blocked after EOS.

deadlines.title: Teams Rooms IntelliFrame People Labels (Windows) GA
deadlines.action: Plan face-enrollment policy and confirm camera compatibility for Rooms devices ahead of GA.
deadlines.applies_to: Orgs running Teams Rooms Pro on Windows with compatible intelligent cameras

deadlines.title: Teams Rooms on Android: Front-of-Room View Control GA
deadlines.action: If you run Town Halls from Rooms on Android, plan testing ahead of GA.
deadlines.applies_to: Orgs running Town Halls via Teams Rooms Pro on Android

deadlines.title: Copilot in PowerPoint: GCC / Sovereign Cloud GA
deadlines.action: Add to your GCC/GCC-H Copilot rollout timeline and validate brand kit configuration ahead of release.
deadlines.applies_to: GCC and sovereign cloud Copilot tenants

deadlines.title: EWS Disablement in Exchange Online
deadlines.action: Audit all apps/service accounts still authenticating via EWS. Configure EWSAllowedAppIDs for stragglers and set internal migration milestones now - don't wait for enforcement to discover dependencies.
deadlines.applies_to: Orgs with apps or service accounts still authenticating to Exchange Online via EWS
